parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;

// Map to exact hvac_premium_agent column names
const body = {
  stripe_customer_id: d.stripe_customer_id || null,
  company_name: d.company_name || '',
  owner_name: d.owner_name || '',
  agent_name: d.agent_name || '',
  client_email: d.client_email || '',
  company_phone: d.main_phone || '',
  lead_phone: d.lead_phone || '',
  lead_email: d.lead_email || '',
  transfer_phone: d.transfer_phone || '',
  emergency_phone: d.emergency_phone || '',
  website: d.website || '',
  industry_type: d.industry_type || 'HVAC',
  years_in_business: d.years_in_business || '',
  timezone: d.timezone || 'America/Chicago',
  services_offered: d.services_offered || '',
  brands_serviced: d.brands_serviced || '',
  service_area: d.service_area || '',
  service_area_radius: d.service_area_radius || '',
  certifications: d.certifications || '',
  licensed_insured: d.licensed_insured || 'Yes',
  business_hours: d.business_hours || '',
  response_time: d.response_time || '',
  emergency_service: d.emergency_service || 'No',
  after_hours_behavior: d.after_hours_behavior || '',
  after_hours_transfer: d.after_hours_transfer || 'all',
  pricing_policy: d.pricing_policy || '',
  diagnostic_fee: d.diagnostic_fee || '',
  standard_fees: d.standard_fees || '',
  free_estimates: d.free_estimates || '',
  financing_available: d.financing_available || 'No',
  financing_details: d.financing_details || '',
  warranty: d.warranty || 'Yes',
  warranty_details: d.warranty_details || '',
  payment_methods: d.payment_methods || '',
  maintenance_plans: d.maintenance_plans || 'No',
  membership_program: d.membership_program || '',
  voice_gender: d.voice_gender || 'Female',
  custom_greeting: d.custom_greeting || '',
  company_tagline: d.company_tagline || '',
  transfer_triggers: d.transfer_triggers || '',
  transfer_behavior: d.transfer_behavior || '',
  lead_contact_method: d.lead_contact_method || 'Both',
  notification_email_2: d.notification_email_2 || '',
  notification_email_3: d.notification_email_3 || '',
  notification_sms_2: d.notification_sms_2 || '',
  notification_sms_3: d.notification_sms_3 || '',
  google_review_rating: d.google_review_rating || '',
  google_review_count: d.google_review_count || '',
  unique_selling_points: d.unique_selling_points || '',
  current_promotion: d.current_promotion || '',
  seasonal_services: d.seasonal_services || '',
  do_not_service: d.do_not_service || '',
  additional_info: d.additional_info || '',
  crm_platform: d.crm_platform || '',
  calendar_platform: d.calendar_platform || '',
  booking_buffer_minutes: parseInt(d.booking_buffer_minutes) || 30,
  default_appointment_duration: parseInt(d.booking_slot_duration) || 60,
  booking_advance_days: 14,
  booking_confirmation_method: d.booking_confirm_method || 'email',
  plan_type: 'premium'
};

const response = await this.helpers.httpRequest({
  method: 'POST',
  url: 'https://hgheyqwnrcvwtgngqdnq.supabase.co/rest/v1/hvac_premium_agent',
  headers: {
    'apikey': 'eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImhnaGV5cXducmN2d3RnbmdxZG5xIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3NDI5NTM1MiwiZXhwIjoyMDg5ODcxMzUyfQ.PENNZ2K5syVFyU3Yn6FfYZP1JEtmanlV6nTrlGaeqsg',
    'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJzdXBhYmFzZSIsInJlZiI6ImhnaGV5cXducmN2d3RnbmdxZG5xIiwicm9sZSI6InNlcnZpY2Vfcm9sZSIsImlhdCI6MTc3NDI5NTM1MiwiZXhwIjoyMDg5ODcxMzUyfQ.PENNZ2K5syVFyU3Yn6FfYZP1JEtmanlV6nTrlGaeqsg',
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'Prefer': 'return=representation'
  },
  body: body,
  json: true
});

return { ...d, _supabase_saved: true };

// ── You're Live Email — Standard + Premium ── // Dynamic variables from Jotform onboarding + agent creation const input = $input.first().json; const companyName = input.company_name || 'your company'; const agentName = input.agent_name || 'your AI Receptionist'; const phone = input.agent_phone_number || ''; const leadEmail = input.lead_email || ''; const planName = input.plan_name || 'Standard'; if (!leadEmail || !phone) { return [{ json: { ...input, _skip: true, _reason: 'missing email or phone' } }]; } const digits = phone.replace(/\D/g, ''); const d = digits.slice(-10); const displayNum = '+1 (' + d.slice(0,3) + ') ' + d.slice(3,6) + '-' + d.slice(6); const QR_IPHONE = 'https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=200x200&color=6C63FF&data=' + encodeURIComponent('App-Prefs:root=Phone&path=CALL_FORWARDING'); const QR_ANDROID = 'https://api.qrserver.com/v1/create-qr-code/?size=200x200&color=6C63FF&data=' + encodeURIComponent('tel:**21*' + digits + '#'); const ICON_URL = 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Syntharra/syntharra-website/main/logo-icon-2x.png'; const LOGO = `
Syntharra
Global AI Solutions
`; const FOOTER = `syntharra.com

Syntharra AI Solutions \u2014 AI Receptionists for the Trade Industry

`; const premiumNote = planName === 'Premium' ? `

Premium Features Active

\u2713 Calendar integration \u2022 \u2713 Smart dispatching \u2022 \u2713 CRM sync

` : ''; const emailHtml = `
${FOOTER}
${LOGO}
You\u2019re Live

Your AI Receptionist is Live!

Great news \u2014 ${agentName} is configured and answering calls 24/7 for ${companyName}. Forward your business number to get started.

Agent: ${agentName}

Status: \u2705 Active \u2014 Answering calls 24/7

${premiumNote}

Your AI Receptionist Number

${displayNum}

Forward your existing business number to this number

Quick Setup \u2014 Scan to Activate

Open your phone camera and scan the QR code for your device.

\ud83d\udcf1 iPhone

Opens Call Forwarding settings directly

\ud83e\udd16 Android

Dials the forwarding code automatically

\u2022 Scan QR with your camera

\u2022 Toggle Call Forwarding on

\u2022 Enter ${displayNum}

\u2022 Scan QR with your camera

\u2022 It dials the code for you

\u2022 Wait for confirmation tone

\u2705 What happens once forwarding is active

\u2022 Every call answered instantly by ${agentName}

\u2022 Lead alerts emailed to you within 30 seconds

\u2022 Weekly call summary report every Monday

\ud83d\udcce Full Setup Guide Attached

We\u2019ve attached a detailed PDF with step-by-step instructions for every carrier, VoIP provider, landline, and business phone system \u2014 including scannable QR codes. Save it or share it with your team.

Need help? Email us at support@syntharra.com

`; return [{ json: { ...input, emailHtml, emailSubject: `Your AI Receptionist is Live \u2014 ${companyName}`, lead_email: leadEmail } }];

nodes.name: Send Welcome Email
nodes.notes: Replace with SES node once email migration is complete. Uses same pattern as standard onboarding welcome email.

nodes.name: Send Internal Notification
nodes.notes: Update 'to' address to support@syntharra.com at go-live.
